title: Build Microhub influencer marketing agency website

requirements.text: Create a hero section with headline 'Stop Spending Lakhs on Ads. Work With Real Creators.', subtext 'Microhub helps brands grow through micro & nano influencer collaborations that actually convert.', two CTA buttons labeled 'Work With Creators' and 'Join As Creator', and modern creator-focused background visuals

quotes: Headline: "Stop Spending Lakhs on Ads. Work With Real Creators."

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays headline and subtext prominently
Two CTA buttons are visible and styled consistently
Background visuals are modern and creator-focused
Section is responsive on mobile devices

requirements.text: Create a problem section highlighting expensive ad campaigns, low engagement, fake influencer reach, and poor ROI, followed by positioning Microhub as the solution

quotes: Highlight: • Expensive ad campaigns • Low engagement • Fake influencer reach • Poor ROI

acceptanceCriteria: Four pain points are clearly displayed
Transition to Microhub solution is clear and compelling
Section has strong visual hierarchy

requirements.text: Create a 'What We Do' section explaining influencer matchmaking, barter & paid campaigns, content-driven brand exposure, and campaign strategy & reporting

quotes: • Influencer matchmaking • Barter & paid campaigns • Content-driven brand exposure • Campaign strategy & reporting

acceptanceCriteria: All four service offerings are displayed clearly
Section uses icons or visual elements to support text
Content is scannable and easy to understand

requirements.text: Create a 'Why Microhub' section emphasizing focus on micro & nano creators, real engagement over fake followers, Mumbai-focused local targeting, and affordability for small & mid brands

quotes: • Only micro & nano creators • Real engagement > fake followers • Mumbai-focused local targeting • Affordable for small & mid brands

acceptanceCriteria: Four unique value propositions are clearly displayed
Section differentiates Microhub from competitors
Design emphasizes trust and credibility

requirements.text: Create a 'How It Works' section with a 4-step process: Step 1 - Brand shares goals, Step 2 - We shortlist creators, Step 3 - Campaign execution, Step 4 - Track performance

quotes: Step 1: Brand shares goals Step 2: We shortlist creators Step 3: Campaign execution Step 4: Track performance

acceptanceCriteria: Four steps are displayed in a clear sequential flow
Each step has a visual indicator (number or icon)
Process is easy to follow and understand

requirements.text: Create a creator recruitment section with the message 'Don't chase brands. Let brands discover you.' and a 'Join Microhub' CTA button

quotes: Message: "Don't chase brands. Let brands discover you."

acceptanceCriteria: Section addresses creators as secondary audience
Message is compelling and action-oriented
CTA button is prominent and styled consistently

requirements.text: Create a testimonials section with placeholders for brand and creator reviews
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes placeholder testimonial cards
Layout supports multiple testimonials
Design includes space for reviewer name and company/role

requirements.text: Create a contact section with a lead form including fields for Name, Brand Name, Budget Range, Contact Number, and Email

quotes: Simple lead form: • Name • Brand Name • Budget Range • Contact Number • Email

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all five required fields
Form has clear labels and validation
Form submission stores lead data
Success/error messages are displayed appropriately

requirements.text: Implement mobile-first responsive design across all sections ensuring optimal viewing and interaction on smartphones and tablets
acceptanceCriteria: All sections adapt gracefully to mobile screens
Touch targets are appropriately sized
Text remains readable on small screens
Navigation works seamlessly on mobile

requirements.text: Add Instagram integration component and a WhatsApp contact button that opens WhatsApp chat
acceptanceCriteria: Instagram integration is visible and functional
WhatsApp button opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message or contact
Both integrations are mobile-optimized

requirements.text: Create a clean footer with Mumbai location information and relevant links
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays Mumbai as company location
Footer includes contact information
Footer design is clean and minimal
Footer is responsive on all screen sizes

requirements.text: Implement modern scroll animations throughout the website for smooth section transitions and element reveals
acceptanceCriteria: Elements animate smoothly as they enter viewport
Animations enhance user experience without being distracting
Animations are performant and don't cause lag
Animations respect user's motion preferences

requirements.text: Implement SEO optimization with appropriate meta tags, structured data, and content optimization targeting the keyword 'Influencer Marketing Agency in Mumbai'

quotes: SEO optimized for "Influencer Marketing Agency in Mumbai"

acceptanceCriteria: Page title and meta description include target keyword
Headings use semantic HTML and include relevant keywords
Images have appropriate alt text
Page follows SEO best practices for local business

requirements.text: Apply a premium minimal design aesthetic with black, white, and electric blue or neon green accent colors, featuring clean layouts, strong typography, and a style that feels youthful yet professional

quotes: Black, white and subtle bold accent color (like electric blue or neon green)

acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses black, white, and chosen bold accent color consistently
Typography is bold and impactful
Layout feels spacious and uncluttered
Overall design balances professionalism with youthful energy
Design prioritizes brand owners as primary audience

constraints: Design must be mobile-first and fully responsive
Primary target audience is brand owners, not creators
Color palette must be limited to black, white, and one bold accent color (electric blue or neon green)
Must maintain premium minimal aesthetic throughout
nonGoals: Building a creator portal or dashboard
Developing admin panel for managing testimonials

required: Modern creator-focused hero background with young diverse creators using smartphones and cameras, premium minimal style (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Abstract geometric pattern in accent color for section backgrounds, minimal style (pattern-accent.dim_800x800.png)
Mumbai cityscape silhouette illustration in minimal line art style (mumbai-skyline.dim_1200x400.png)
